summary: Draft/closed Corneria stage decomp progress PR opened as a handoff/reference for a later PR. It added many grcorneria.c function bodies, updated some grcorneria.h prototypes, expanded Corneria-related ground types, and added target_funcs entries. Bot report showed one new match, grCorneria_801E2110, plus many high-score unmatched improvements, but also a .sdata regression.

key_files.role: Primary decomp source changes for Corneria; added structs, globals, externs, includes, and many function bodies replacing placeholder markers.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/grcorneria.c +564/-29 in 11 hunks

raw_diff: grcorneria.c adds lbaudio_ax include, grCn_Entry/grCn_JointPair/grCn_ConvData/grCn_Data definitions, grCorneria_801DCCFC, grCorneria_801DD350, grCorneria_801DDAC4, grCorneria_801DDE88, grCorneria_801DFC98, grCorneria_801DFF20, grCorneria_801E01A8, grCorneria_801E0678, grCorneria_801E08CC, grCorneria_801E2110, grCorneria_801E2228, grCorneria_801E25C4

key_files.role: Header prototype cleanup for recovered Corneria functions.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/grcorneria.h +4/-4 in 3 hunks
raw_diff: grCorneria_801DCCFC changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to s32(void); grCorneria_801DDE88 changed to s32(HSD_GObj*)

key_files.role: Ground type surface updated for Corneria-related fields.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/types.h +39/-4 in 1 hunk
metadata_json.changed_files lists src/melee/gr/types.h

key_files.role: Target function list updated for this decomp work.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: target_funcs.txt +28/-0 in 1 hunk
metadata_json.changed_files lists target_funcs.txt

what_changed.text: Added multiple Corneria function bodies in grcorneria.c, replacing placeholder comments for stage setup, arwing/platform movement, camera-region checks, color setup, conversion/joint setup, and related logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: placeholder markers replaced for grCorneria_801DCCFC, 801DD350, 801DDAC4, 801DDE88, 801DFC98, 801DFF20, 801E01A8, 801E0678, 801E08CC, 801E2110, 801E2228, 801E25C4

what_changed.text: Added local Corneria data/type scaffolding in grcorneria.c, including grCn_Entry, grCn_JointPair, grCn_ConvData, and a more detailed grCn_Data layout with positions, indices, x30/x48 arrays, joint_pairs, and entries.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef additions near top of src/melee/gr/grcorneria.c

what_changed.text: Added static globals grCn_804D69A8 and grCn_804D69B0 and static color-like s32 data grCn_804DB218 through grCn_804DB238 used by grCorneria_801E2110.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static s32 additions near grCn_804D69A0 and before grCorneria_801E2110

what_changed.text: Added lb/lbaudio_ax.h include and used lbAudioAx_800237A8 in grCorneria_801DDE88 for audio triggers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: +#include "lb/lbaudio_ax.h"; grCorneria_801DDE88 calls lbAudioAx_800237A8

what_changed.text: Updated grcorneria.h prototypes for at least grCorneria_801DCCFC and grCorneria_801DDE88 from unknown signatures to typed signatures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grcorneria.h UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS replacements

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded matched-code progress: one new full match for grCorneria_801E2110, thirteen improvements in unmatched items, and a .sdata regression.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment by decomp-dev[bot] at 2026-04-03T17:13:56Z

smart_moves.text: The PR body explicitly framed the branch as a progress snapshot for another contributor, which helps separate reusable work from accepted/merged source changes.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: "Will be superceded by another PR by nemo... keep track of how far we got... useful in here"

smart_moves.text: Recovered function signatures were propagated into grcorneria.h rather than leaving only source-local knowledge.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grcorneria.h prototype updates for grCorneria_801DCCFC and grCorneria_801DDE88

smart_moves.text: The added grCn_Data layout consolidated several previously local/incomplete layout fragments into one broader struct used across functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: old grCn_Data fragment removed near grCorneria_801DDDA8; new grCn_Data definition added near top

decomp_lessons.text: When recovering a stage file with many related functions, adding a shared local data layout can unlock multiple function attempts, but any remaining raw offsets and union borrowing should be treated as incomplete type recovery rather than final style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCn_Data definition used across grCorneria_801DCCFC, 801DDAC4, 801DDE88, 801E25C4
raw_diff: remaining M2C_FIELD uses and raw u8*/casted GroundVars accesses

decomp_lessons.text: Header prototypes should be updated when a recovered body proves return and parameter types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCorneria_801DCCFC body returns s32 and header updated to s32(void)
raw_diff: grCorneria_801DDE88 body takes HSD_GObj* and returns s32; header updated accordingly

decomp_lessons.text: A high text-section score can still come with data-section regressions; this PR's bot report is a reminder to separate text-match progress from .sdata/.sdata2/.sbss movement before curation or landing.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl bot report: +280 bytes new match for grCorneria_801E2110; .sdata regression from 70.97% to 51.16%

naming_conventions.text: New local struct names use the grCn_ prefix and descriptive-ish roles where evidence is partial: grCn_Entry, grCn_JointPair, grCn_ConvData, grCn_Data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct additions in grcorneria.c

naming_conventions.text: Many fields remain offset-style names such as x30, x48, xC4, xD8, xE0_flags_b0, preserving uncertainty rather than inventing fuller semantics.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCn_Data and GroundVars accesses throughout added functions

naming_conventions.text: Simple local role names such as gp, gp2, jobj, gobj, data, cv, pair, speed, counter, and idx were used where the role is locally clear.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added function bodies in grCorneria_801DDAC4, 801DDE88, 801E2228, 801E25C4

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: PAD_STACK was used in several functions, with sizes adjusted per function, including PAD_STACK(16), PAD_STACK(8), PAD_STACK(32), and a change from PAD_STACK(16) to PAD_STACK(12) in grCorneria_801E1878.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK uses in grCorneria_801DDAC4, 801DDE88, 801DFC98, 801DFF20, 801E01A8, 801E0678, 801E08CC, 801E2228, 801E25C4; grCorneria_801E1878 stack pad change
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Loaded evidence includes score report but not narrow objdiff rationale for each PAD_STACK; standards require explicit evidence before preserving stack padding as reviewable style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: M2C_FIELD and raw byte/typed casts were retained for unrecovered fields, including grCn_804D69A0 offsets and raw Ground byte flags.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: M2C_FIELD(grCn_804D69A0, f32*, 0x3C/0x40/0x70/0x88); raw = (u8*) gp in grCorneria_801DFC98/801DFF20/801E01A8
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This is bridge code under typed-fields-over-pointer-math, not an accepted final convention.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Natural loop form was used for hiding joint pairs in grCorneria_801E25C4: initialize i and pair, process entries, increment both, and loop while i < 5.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCorneria_801E25C4 do/while over grCn_803E1D38.joint_pairs

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Switch statements were used for mode/stage dispatch in grCorneria_801DCCFC, grCorneria_801DDE88, and movement helpers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: switch(var_r3), switch(gp->gv.arwing.xD8), switch((s8) raw[0xC5])

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Color constants for grCorneria_801E2110 were materialized as static s32 variables and copied to stack locals before casting to GXColor* calls; bot report says this function became a 100% new match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCn_804DB218 through grCn_804DB238 and grCorneria_801E2110
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: grCorneria_801E2110 +280 bytes, 0.00% to 100.00%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Because the same bot report shows a .sdata regression, these static data additions should be reviewed as data ownership/split-sensitive rather than generalized.

follow_up_queries: Find successor Nemo PR for grcorneria / Corneria after PR #2382 and compare which functions or types were reused.
Search current grcorneria.c for grCorneria_801E2110 and grCn_804DB218 to see whether the static color data approach survived.
Search current src/melee/gr/types.h for arwing/corneria fields touched by PR #2382 to identify accepted field names replacing raw offsets.
Look for later removal or replacement of M2C_FIELD(grCn_804D69A0, ...) in grcorneria.c.
Check whether grCorneria_801E25C4 loop and grCn_JointPair naming were retained in the merged successor work.
Search bot reports or later PRs for .sdata regression in main/melee/gr/grcorneria after PR #2382.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header prototypes should follow recovered bodies
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2382, recovered Corneria bodies were accompanied by grcorneria.h prototype updates, e.g. grCorneria_801DCCFC became s32(void) and grCorneria_801DDE88 became s32(HSD_GObj*). This is a PR-specific example supporting the existing truthful-headers-and-includes standard.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grcorneria.h prototype updates
raw_diff: corresponding function bodies

accepted_candidate_records.title: Progress snapshots can be useful but should not be curated as accepted style
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2382 was explicitly opened as a superseded progress tracker for another contributor. Its code and bot report are useful search evidence, but raw offsets, stack padding, and data changes should be verified against successor work before reuse.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text
text_corpus.jsonl bot report

source_update_candidates.title: grcorneria stage file uses Corneria-specific GroundVars and grCn data scaffolding
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2382 suggests src/melee/gr/grcorneria.c work involved Corneria stage object state, arwing/corneria GroundVars, grCn_Data-like data layouts, and HSD_JObj/Ground helpers. Verify against current source or successor PR before recording as a path fact.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCn_Data, grCn_JointPair, grCn_ConvData additions
raw_diff: GroundVars accesses such as gv.arwing and gv.corneria
changed_files.jsonl
source_update_candidates.reason: Could improve path-level search for Corneria stage decomp, but PR was not merged and diff is incomplete.

source_update_candidates.title: Superseded PR snapshots should be treated as search evidence, not acceptance evidence
source_update_candidates.text: When a PR body says the work will be superseded and is opened to preserve progress, use it for candidate symbols, tactics, and follow-up searches, but require successor/current-source verification before treating style or types as accepted.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: superseded by another PR by nemo; opened to track progress/useful material
source_update_candidates.reason: This may be a useful curation-process rule, but it should be reviewed as a workflow/source update rather than inferred as a project standard from one PR alone.

source_update_candidates.title: Data symbol additions in code-match PRs need regression review
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2382 matched grCorneria_801E2110 using static s32 color data, while the bot report also showed a .sdata regression. This supports reviewing static data additions and section movement separately from text-section function matches.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static grCn_804DB218 through grCn_804DB238 used by grCorneria_801E2110
text_corpus.jsonl bot report: grCorneria_801E2110 100%; .sdata regression
source_update_candidates.reason: Already overlaps with loaded text-before-data-matching and data-sections-and-tu-splits standards; curator may choose whether this PR should be added as an example.

rejection_notes: Do not promote grCn_Data, grCn_JointPair, grCn_ConvData, or GroundVars field names as accepted current names from this PR alone; it was closed unmerged and superseded.

Do not treat M2C_FIELD, raw u8* Ground access, borrowed gv.bigblueroute fields, or PAD_STACK sizes as accepted style; they are visible tactics without per-function objdiff rationale in the loaded evidence.
Do not infer human reviewer approval or requested changes; there were no loaded human reviews or review comments.
Do not claim all added functions matched; the bot report showed only grCorneria_801E2110 as a new full match, with other functions listed as unmatched-item improvements.
